item.title: The Biggest Meal I've Ever Attempted
item.description: A fun food challenge featuring the biggest meal yet, with a focus on portion size, flavor, and the challenge experience.

media:content.media:title: The Biggest Meal I've Ever Attempted
media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge featuring the biggest meal yet, with a focus on portion size, flavor, and the challenge experience.

item.title: Wendy's Burger Speed Challenge
item.description: A fast-paced Wendy's challenge featuring 3 burgers and a 1 minute 30 second time limit. Fun, quick, and all about the burger finish.

media:content.media:title: Wendy's Burger Speed Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fast-paced Wendy's challenge featuring 3 burgers and a 1 minute 30 second time limit. Fun, quick, and all about the burger finish.

item.title: Eli’s Skillet Showdown!
item.description: Eli’s Skillet Showdown! A fun skillet cooking challenge with big flavor and outdoor energy.

media:content.media:title: Eli’s Skillet Showdown!
media:content.media:description: Eli’s Skillet Showdown! A fun skillet cooking challenge with big flavor and outdoor energy.

item.title: Brake-Check Road Clip in New Jersey
item.description: A New Jersey road clip about a brake-check incident, dash cam footage, and police evidence turned over after a close call.

media:content.media:title: Brake-Check Road Clip in New Jersey
media:content.media:description: A New Jersey road clip about a brake-check incident, dash cam footage, and police evidence turned over after a close call.

item.title: Heart Attack Burger Challenge
item.description: A huge burger challenge with a fun, competitive vibe. Big portions, bold flavor, and plenty of food challenge energy.

media:content.media:title: Heart Attack Burger Challenge
media:content.media:description: A huge burger challenge with a fun, competitive vibe. Big portions, bold flavor, and plenty of food challenge energy.

item.title: Vermilion Snapper Like You’ve Never Had
item.description: A simple, flavorful take on vermilion snapper that highlights the fish’s fresh taste and satisfying presentation.

media:content.media:title: Vermilion Snapper Like You’ve Never Had
media:content.media:description: A simple, flavorful take on vermilion snapper that highlights the fish’s fresh taste and satisfying presentation.

item.title: Homewrecker Challenge Has a New Champion
item.description: A new champion takes on The Homewrecker Challenge in a fun food showdown. Big portions, bold flavor, and plenty of challenge-day energy.

media:content.media:title: Homewrecker Challenge Has a New Champion
media:content.media:description: A new champion takes on The Homewrecker Challenge in a fun food showdown. Big portions, bold flavor, and plenty of challenge-day energy.

item.title: Giant Steak Challenge or $100
item.description: A giant steak challenge with a $100 fallback if it’s not finished. Big portions, bold flavor, and a fun food challenge setup.

media:content.media:title: Giant Steak Challenge or $100
media:content.media:description: A giant steak challenge with a $100 fallback if it’s not finished. Big portions, bold flavor, and a fun food challenge setup.
